beINSports3.au.subtitle: Internacional vs Chivas Guadalajara - Final 2010

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: Corinthians vs Boca Juniors - Final 2012
beINSports3.au.description: 2012: Corinthians won the Copa Libertadores for the first time, Emerson scoring twice in the second leg of the final to sink the six-time champion.

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: Atletico MG vs Olimpia - Final 2013

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: San Lorenzo vs Nacional - Final 2014
beINSports3.au.description: 2014: San Lorenzo of Argentina, Pope Francis' favourite team, defeated Paraguayan side Nacional to win the Copa Libertadores title for the first time.

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: River Plate vs Tigres - Final 2015
beINSports3.au.description: 2015: Argentina's River Plate completed the most remarkable transformation in the team's history by beating Mexican club Tigres to guarantee their third triumph.

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: Atletico Nacional vs Del Valle - Final 2016
beINSports3.au.description: 2016: Atletico Nacional won their second Copa Libertadores title, defeating upstarts Independiente del Valle in the second leg of the final.

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: Lanus vs Gremio - Final 2017
beINSports3.au.description: 2017: Gremio's coach Renato Portaluppi won his first continental title as a manager through goals from Fernandinho and Luan.

beINSports3.au.title: Classic Copa Libertadores
beINSports3.au.subtitle: River Plate vs Boca Juniors - Final 2018
beINSports3.au.description: 2018: A stunning strike by Juan Quintero helped River Plate to clinch their fourth Libertadores title and victory over arch-rivals Boca in Madrid.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Philadelphia Phillies v New York Mets (Start-time 12.20am). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park. These two teams last met towards the end of last season in a four-match series that saw the Phillies win all four games. The hosts won 1-0, 9-3, 11-3 and 6-4 to claim the whitewash in a series that continued their strong end to the 2025 season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: Portugal play Congo DR in the Group K opener at Houston Stadium. Cristiano Ronaldo makes a historic sixth World Cup appearance after scoring in five qualifiers to set a historic scoring record. Congo DR advanced after beating Jamaica.

FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: Uzbekistan and Colombia face off in the second fixture of Group K at Mexico City Stadium. Uzbekistan's team lost only once during the entirety of their qualifiers to advance for their first World Cup. Colombia advanced after a high CONMEBOL finish.

FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: England take on Croatia in the Group L opener at Dallas Stadium in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Harry Kane arrives in peak form after scoring 61 goals for Bayern Munich, while midfielder Luka Modrić enters his fifth career World Cup tournament.

FS2.HD.us2.title: United Football League
FS2.HD.us2.description: The St. Louis Battlehawks host the Louisville Kings for the United Football League semifinals at The Dome at America's Center. St. Louis ranks second in the UFL. The winner of this playoff clash advances directly to the 2026 UFL Championship Game.

FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: Canada faces Qatar in a Group B match of the FIFA World Cup at BC Place Vancouver. Canada comes off a 1-1 draw behind a 78th-minute Cyle Larin goal, while Swiss player Miro Muheim scored a 94th-minute own goal to give Qatar a 1-1 draw.

FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: Czechia battles South Africa in a Group A match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Czechia aims to rebound from a 2-1 loss to Korea where Ladislav Krejci scored, while Lyle Foster and South Africa look to avenge a loss against Mexico.

FS2.HD.us2.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
FS2.HD.us2.description: Switzerland plays Bosnia and Herzegovina in a Group B FIFA World Cup match at Los Angeles Stadium. Swiss player Miro Muheim scored a 94th-minute own goal to give Qatar a 1-1 draw, while Bosnia enters after a 1-1 tie behind a Jovo Lukic goal.

CNN.HD.us2.title: This Land

CNN.HD.us2.title: This Land

truTV.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
truTV.HD.us2.description: The future of civilization rests in the fate of the One Ring, which has been lost for centuries. Powerful forces are unrelenting in their search for it. But fate has placed it in the hands of a young Hobbit named Frodo Baggins (Elijah Wood), who inherits the Ring and steps into legend. A daunting task lies ahead for Frodo when he becomes the Ringbearer - to destroy the One Ring in the fires of Mount Doom where it was forged.

truTV.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers

Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

truTV.HD.us2.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King

Tolkien classic, "The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King" presents the final confrontation between the forces of good and evil fighting for control of the future of Middle-earth. Hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring', while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Sauron's evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith.

TBS.HD.us2.subtitle: The One Where Rosita Dies

TBS.HD.us2.title: Friends
TBS.HD.us2.subtitle: The One in Massapequa
TBS.HD.us2.description: Phoebe brings her annoyingly upbeat boyfriend to the 35th anniversary of Monica and Ross' parents, who urge Ross and pregnant Rachel to pretend to be married.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Friends
TBS.HD.us2.subtitle: The One Where No One Proposes
TBS.HD.us2.description: Joey finds himself engaged to Rachel soon after she delivers her baby girl, while Phoebe assumes Ross is the one who proposed; Joey sneaks a peek as Rachel tries unsuccessfully to nurse; Monica and Chandler retire to a supply closet for privacy.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Rush Hour
TBS.HD.us2.description: When a Chinese diplomat's daughter is kidnapped in Los Angeles, he calls in Hong Kong Detective Inspector Lee (Jackie Chan) to assist the FBI with the case. But the FBI doesn't want anything to do with Lee, and they dump him off on the LAPD, who assign wisecracking Detective James Carter (Chris Tucker) to watch over him. Although Lee and Carter can't stand each other, they choose to work together to solve the case on their own when they figure out they've been ditched by both the FBI and police.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Rush Hour 2
TBS.HD.us2.description: After an explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong kills two customs agents investigating currency smuggling, Inspector Lee (Jackie Chan) and James Carter (Chris Tucker) search for the mastermind. Ricky Tan (John Lone), head of the Fu-Cang-Long Triad, sends out his minions to insure that Carter and Lee don't solve the case.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Rush Hour 3
TBS.HD.us2.description: East meets West when the assassination of Ambassador Han leads to the reunion of Lee and Carter. In Paris, the pair must stay one step ahead of Chinese gangsters and Lee's childhood friend, as they track down an envelope containing the identity of a powerful crime lord.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
AMC.HD.us2.description: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Slippery Silks
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are carpenters who inherit a fancy dress boutique; they put on a fashion show with dresses they've designed based on furniture; during the show, the boys break a Ming vase.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: They Stooge to Conga
AMC.HD.us2.description: The trio encounters Nazis; guest Lloyd Bridges.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jumanji
AMC.HD.us2.description: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-mannered monkeys and even stampeding rhinos!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Cast Away
AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: Civil War
AMC.HD.us2.description: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into an all-out feud, Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye (Jeremy Renner) must pick a side.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Live: TNA iMPACT!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Mike Santana, Nic Nemeth, and KC Navarro face Order 4, Moose and The Hardys battle The System, and Kazarian hosts The King's Speech with Leon Slater & Cedric Alexander on the road to Slammiversary!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Gladiator
AMC.HD.us2.description: Commodus (Joaquin Phoenix) takes power and strips rank from Maximus (Russell Crowe), one of the favored generals of his predecessor and father, Emperor Marcus Aurelius, the great stoical philosopher. Maximus is then relegated to fighting to the death in the gladiator arenas.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Battle: Los Angeles
AMC.HD.us2.description: For many years, humans have reported various UFO sightings around the world, fueling speculation about the existence of life on other worlds. In 2011, mankind learns the truth the hard way when alien invaders attack. One by one, the world's great cities fall, leaving Los Angeles as the battleground for humanity's last stand. It's up to a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon to draw a line in the sand against a powerful enemy unlike any previously encountered.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mayfair Witches
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: The Innocents
AMC.HD.us2.description: Rowan is determined to save Lasher; Cortland becomes an unlikely adversary.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Déjà Vu
AMC.HD.us2.description: The team of top-secret program brings ATF agent Doug Carlin (Denzel Washington) into its midst to capture the terrorist (Jim Caviezel) responsible for a ferry bombing that left hundreds dead. Its amazing technology lets the team fold time four days backward and see the madman's movements as he plots to kill a woman who could give him away. Doug realizes that the technology could allow him to do what law-enforcement officers dream of -- go back in time to prevent the crime.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
AMC.HD.us2.description: Chaos reigns in the New York City subway system when heavily armed criminals, led by a mastermind named Ryder (John Travolta), hijack a subway train and threaten to kill everyone on board unless a large ransom is paid. Dispatcher Walter Garber (Denzel Washington) uses his extensive knowledge of the transit system in a bid to outwit the hijackers and save the hostages, but one question remains: even if the hijackers get their money, how can they possibly escape?

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Equalizer
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert McCall (Denzel Washington), a man of mysterious origin who believes he has put the past behind him, dedicates himself to creating a quiet new life. However, when he meets Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), a teenager who has been manhandled by violent Russian mobsters, he simply cannot walk away. With his set of formidable skills, McCall comes out of self-imposed retirement and emerges as an avenging angel, ready to take down anyone who brutalizes the helpless.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: Civil War
AMC.HD.us2.description: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into an all-out feud, Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye (Jeremy Renner) must pick a side.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
AMC.HD.us2.description: It is 1941 and the world is in the throes of war. Steve Rogers (Chris Evans) wants to do his part and join America's armed forces, but the military rejects him because of his small stature. Finally, Steve gets his chance when he is accepted into an experimental program that turns him into a supersoldier called Captain America. Joining forces with Bucky Barnes (Sebastian Stan) and Peggy Carter (Hayley Atwell), Captain America leads the fight against the Nazi-backed HYDRA organization.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the cataclysmic events in New York with his fellow Avengers, Steve Rogers, aka Captain America (Chris Evans), lives in the nation's capital as he tries to adjust to modern times. An attack on an S.H.I.E.L.D. colleague throws Rogers into a web of intrigue that places the whole world at risk. Joining forces with the Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and a new ally, the Falcon, Rogers struggles to expose an ever-widening conspiracy, but he and his team soon come up against an unexpected enemy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Equalizer 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Joseph Pistone (Johnny Depp) is an FBI agent who has infiltrated one of the major New York Mafia families and is living under the name Donnie Brasco. He develops a relationship with mob hitman Benjamin "Lefty" Ruggiero (Al Pacino) in order to get deeper under cover, but ends up developing a real friendship with the Mafioso. As their relationship develops, Pistone must decide whether to complete his job, knowing that it will lead to the murder of his new friend.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Proyecciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana sofoca a su hija Julia con normas estrictas y cuando la joven descubre el oscuro pasado de su madre, la enfrenta. Tras reflexionar, deciden retomar sus vidas sin prejuicios ni mentiras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mayra: La verdadera libertad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrés intenta asesinar a sus hijos tras discutir con Mayra, su esposa, y por accidente termina muerto. Ella va a la cárcel acusada de asesinato, al salir de prisión demuestra su inocencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvar vidas, salvar almas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Renée y su hermano Jonatan son paramédicos, ambos se toman muy en serio su trabajo, al punto de comprometerse hasta lograr que una joven víctima supere el círculo de violencia que la rodea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Más vale correr a tiempo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julio y Mauricio quieren ganar una cocina integral, pero no lo logran y se van en la fastidiosa quinta pregunta. Diana y Rafael quieren ganar la supercanasta, pero prefieren escaparse con sus premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Papá con sorpresa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un padre transexual cambia su identidad y ahora se llama Gia. Para suavizar la noticia, se presenta ante su hijo como una tía amiga, pero el chico se enamora y crea un conflicto familiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quiero rehacer mi vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan revela que Margarita, su hija, no acepta a su nueva pareja. Ella dice que su papá no está enamorado, que solo busca una sirvienta y que su mujer está con él solo por el interés del dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Perdonó su infidelidad y ahora le estorbamos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Armando denuncia que su padre maltrata a su madre, tanto verbal como físicamente, y afirma que no lo va a permitir. Asegura que su papá quiere llevar a su amante a la casa e irrespetar a su mamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Pasión Mundial
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La celebración mundialista no se detiene. Se reúne todo lo que deja el duelo que acaba de finalizar y ofrece una mirada al próximo encuentro. Comentarios expertos, voces de jugadores y más.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 2 del Grupo A. México se enfrenta a República de Corea desde el Estadio Guadalajara. El Tri derrotó a los asiáticos por 2-1 en la fase de grupos de Rusia 2018, resultado que ayudó a los mexicanos a avanzar a octavos de final.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cada día del Mundial es una fábrica de historias. Golazos, frases inolvidables, curiosidades, polémicas... Lo más lindo, lo más llamativo y lo más divertido de la máxima cita del fútbol.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sexos cruzados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Clara le disputa a César la custodia de sus dos hijos, Camilo y Andrea, lo considera una mala influencia. Lo acusa de exponerlos en una campaña para menores transgénero producida por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Siempre niña
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una madre que sufrió abuso cuando era menor, intenta que su hija, ya adolescente, siga viviendo como una niña.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Post Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras los partidos, toca el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza lo ocurrido sobre el terreno de juego en los encuentros del Mundial y aporta imágenes inéditas. Los protagonistas del encuentro también ofrecen su punto de vista.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Ghana-Panamá
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Green Lions
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Cuando Camerún derrotó a la actual campeona del mundo, Argentina, en el partido inaugural de Italia '90, fue, posiblemente, la mayor sorpresa de la historia de los Mundiales. Pero eso fue sólo el principio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Portugal-RD del Congo
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Buenos días América
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Durante el Mundial, este espacio toma el pulso a todo lo acontecido en Norteamérica en la gran cita de Selecciones del año. Las mejores imágenes de los partidos y el análisis para empezar el día informado de lo que ha acontecido durante la madrugada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Stories From The Cities
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un espacio que recorre las ciudades sede de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá. En lugar de enfocarse únicamente en los estadios, el show explora la cultura local, la gastronomía, la música, la gente y el arraigo del fútbol base (fútbol comunitario) en cada una de ellas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial - Highlights del día
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso rápido a los mejores momentos del Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso a los mejores equipos y jugadores que estarán presentes en el Mundial de 2026.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Lopetegui
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Julen Lopetegui se sincera en Revelado, un espacio de DAZN en el que conocemos el lado más personal de los protagonistas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Trending Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial es tendencia. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA es, sin duda, el torneo global más seguido del planeta y, por tanto, deja momentos muy comentados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: DAZN Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La extensa cobertura de DAZN en el Mundial cuenta con una prolongada previa sobre lo que va a ocurrir durante la jornada. El canal cuenta con periodistas desplazados hasta Norteamérica para acercar al espectador a todo lo que ocurre durante la Copa del Mundo.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Tijjani Noslin
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Tijjani Noslin deelt zijn onwaarschijnlijke levensverhaal van Subway-medewerker tot smaakmaker in de Serie A bij Lazio Roma. Hij praat openhartig over zijn moeilijke jeugd, de loodzware burn-out die hij onderweg overwon en de extreme druk van de kritische Italiaanse achterban. Tot slot legt de vastberaden aanvaller uit waarom hij zijn droom voor het Nederlands elftal nog niet opgeeft en hoe een emotioneel advies van zijn moeder hem deed besluiten om te blijven wachten op Oranje.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: De Zolder van El Sierd
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Sierd de Vos is al jaren sportjournalist en werkt al lang als commentator van het Spaanse voetbal. Door de jaren heen heeft hij bijzondere verhalen gemaakt met sporters. Voor nieuwe en bijzondere verhalen is Sierd op zijn zolder gaan kijken.

Eenmaal daar waren de heren onder de indruk van de sfeer en wie ze wel niet allemaal tegen kwamen. De nostalgische Italiaanse voetbalharten gingen sneller kloppen bij de mannen en na de wedstrijd deelde ze mee in de feestvreugde van Internazionale samen met Denzel Dumfries.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Loyaliteit
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: Na een teleurstellend einde van 2021 verwelkomden de All Blacks in juli het nummer één team ter wereld, Ierland, voor een reeks van drie tests. Het team werd op en naast het veld uitgedaagd, wat een ongekende verandering in het trainingskamp teweegbracht. Het team reisde af naar Zuid-Afrika om te vechten voor trots- en voor elkaar.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Wes & Raf
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Op De Eindtoernooien
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Rondo
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Oranje WK 1994
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In deze Rondo special kijkt Wytse van der Goot samen met Dick Advocaat, Peter van Vossen, Rob Witschge en Aron Winter terug op het WK van 1994.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Langs de Vangrails
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Wilco Zeelenberg
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Langs de Vangrails is een studioprogramma waarin bekende motorsportpersoonlijkheden worden geïnterviewd door Olav Mol. In deze aflevering staat oud motorcoureur en teambaas Wilco Zeelenberg centraal.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 25/26 ROSHN Saudi League MW 31 - Al Qadsiah vs Al Nassr
unifi.spotv.my.description: Prominent professional players take centre-stage in the ROSHN Saudi League. Don't miss a moment of these matches every week. Download SPOTV NOW and catch these live matches and highlights.

unifi.spotv.my.title: (L) 2026 U.S. Open Championship - Round 1
unifi.spotv.my.description: The world's top golfers face one of the sport's toughest tests, battling for major glory with precision play, mental strength, and championship determination.

unifi.spotv.my.title: Formula E S12: Rd 11 Sanya E-Prix - Preview
unifi.spotv.my.description: The electric racing revolution continues in Formula E Season 12, as top drivers battle across iconic cities for the world championship crown.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 Sokin T100 San Francisco - Highlights
unifi.spotv.my.description: Elite male triathletes compete through the streets and waterfront of San Francisco, pushing the limits of endurance in a world-class swim, bike, and run challenge.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 Hyundai Archery World Cup, Stage 3 Antalya (TUR) - Recurve Team Finals
unifi.spotv.my.description: Consisting of four stages and a grand final, the Hyundai Archery World Cup features international elite recurve and compound archers shooting for the title of Hyundai Archery World Cup Champion.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 Hyundai Archery World Cup, Stage 3 Antalya (TUR) - Recurve Individual Semifinals & Finals
unifi.spotv.my.description: Consisting of four stages and a grand final, the Hyundai Archery World Cup features international elite recurve and compound archers shooting for the title of Hyundai Archery World Cup Champion.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 Ice Hockey World Championship, Switzerland - Gold Medal SUI vs FIN
unifi.spotv.my.description: The world's top national teams compete in Switzerland for ice hockey glory, delivering fast-paced action, fierce rivalries, and championship drama on the international stage.

unifi.spotv.my.title: (L) Formula E S12: Rd 11 Sanya E-Prix - Free Practice 1
unifi.spotv.my.description: The electric racing revolution continues in Formula E Season 12, as top drivers battle across iconic cities for the world championship crown.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 WorldSBK: Rd 7 Pirelli Emilia-Romagna Round - Highlights
unifi.spotv.my.description: The FIM Superbike World Championship is the leading production motorcycle racing series in the world with over 100 riders from more than 20 countries competing in various classes over 12 rounds.

unifi.spotv.my.title: 2026 WorldWCR: Rd 4 Pirelli Emilia-Romagna Round - Race 1

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, June 15, the Octagon comes to Washington, D.C. as UFC Freedom 250 brings a star-studded lineup to The White House. In the main event, undefeated lightweight champion Ilia “El Matador” Topuria faces off with interim titleholder Justin “The Highlight” Gaethje to determine who is the undisputed best in the 155-pound weight class. In the co-main event, former middleweight and light heavyweight champion Alex “Poatan” Pereira looks to become the first fighter to hold UFC gold in three weight classes as he squares off with Ciryl “Bon Gamin” Gane in a clash for the interim UFC heavyweight title.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1103: International Fighters
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts features explosive KOs from international fighters, showcasing stars from Russia, England, and South Africa like Dricus du Plessis, Paddy Pimblett, Ilia Topuria, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA - LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: More than a title-winning machine, Pep Guardiola changed the face of football. Trace the evolution of his famed “tiki-taka” style of play that propelled the likes of Messi, Xavi, Iniesta and Busquets to footballing royalty.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Muhammad vs. Bonfim - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The opening event of June is set to close with a critical matchup in the welterweight division as former champion Belal “Remember the Name” Muhammad faces off with Gabriel “Marretinha” Bonfim on Sunday, June 7 at Meta APEX in Las Vegas, Nevada. Muhammad put together an 11-fight unbeaten streak to claim the welterweight title at UFC 304, toppling Leon Edwards and aims to cement his standing amongst the division's best by turning back the ascending Brazilian.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 311: Makhachev vs Moicano
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Champion Islam Makhachev looks to break the record for the most consecutive UFC Lightweight title defenses as he faces fan favorite Renato Moicano in the main event of UFC 311, while Bantamweight Champion Merab Dvalishvili defends his belt for the first time against undefeated Umar Nurmagomedov in the co-main. Plus much more action on UFC Reloaded.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 13
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. A winner of seven of his last eight appearances and each of his last three outings, Kape makes his 2026 debut off a first-round knockout win over former title challenger Brandon Royval last December in the same building. A title challenger during his first stint with the promotion, Horiuchi has earned back-to-back wins since returning to the UFC last November and looks to cement his standing as a contender with a third straight standout performance.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1005: Usman vs. Edwards 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 278 was headlined by a rematch between long reigning middleweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and UFC vet Leon “Rocky” Edwards. See their fight like never before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 311: Makhachev vs Moicano

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 314: Volkanovski vs Lopes

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje - Main

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 311: Makhachev vs Moicano
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Champion Islam Makhachev looks to break the record for the most consecutive UFC Lightweight title defenses as he faces fan favorite Renato Moicano in the main event of UFC 311, while Bantamweight Champion Merab Dvalishvili defends his belt for the first time against undefeated Umar Nurmagomedov in the co-main. Plus much more action on UFC Reloaded.
